💗 a community for women

gals who date

Gals Who Date is your community for all your dating advice!!! Where to go to meet people, a second opinion on a text exchange or just some supportive advice on your recent relationship. A safe space for women to discuss modern dating and their experiences!

why gals who date?

a safe space to chat connections, relationships and more

that confusing text, the third date that went nowhere, the ick you can't quite explain — Gals Who Date is where you can chat it all and get real support back!! no judgement, just honest advice and the kind of support that makes modern dating feel a little less lonely.
